Trait nautilus_infrastructure::cache::CacheDatabase

source · 
pub trait CacheDatabase {
    type DatabaseType;

    // Required methods
    fn new(
        trader_id: TraderId,
        config: HashMap<String, Value>
    ) -> Result<Self::DatabaseType>;
    fn read(&mut self, op_type: String) -> Result<Vec<Vec<u8>>>;
    fn write(
        &mut self,
        op_type: String,
        payload: Vec<Vec<u8>>
    ) -> Result<(), String>;
    fn handle_ops(
        trader_id: TraderId,
        config: HashMap<String, Value>,
        rx: Receiver<DatabaseOperation>
    );
}
